description: A farmer has received a soil test report and needs help interpreting the results and generating fertilizer recommendations.

nodes.task_description: Parse the soil test report to extract the values for pH, phosphorus (P), and potassium (K).

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully extracts the key nutrient values.

nodes.task_description: Identify the target crop to be grown (e.g., corn) and its nutrient requirements.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent gets the nutrient uptake values for corn.

nodes.task_description: Generate a fertilizer recommendation for P and K based on the soil test results and the crop's needs.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent provides a recommendation in pounds per acre for P and K.

nodes.task_description: If the pH is low, recommend a lime application to correct the soil acidity.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent identifies a low pH and recommends applying 2 tons of lime per acre.
